trends.headline: Starlink shuts down its GPS-style cheat code. Researchers may unlock it anyway.
trends.summary: Shutdown of Starlink location feature won’t dampen interest in GPS alternatives.

trends.headline: cPanel CVE-2026-41940 Under Active Exploitation to Deploy Filemanager Backdoor
trends.summary:
A threat actor named Mr_Rot13 has been attributed to the exploitation of a recently disclosed critical cPanel flaw to deploy a backdoor codenamed Filemanager on compromised environments.

trends.headline: Slovenia, Spain and Ireland won't air Eurovision over Israel's participation
trends.summary: The three European countries are boycotting the popular song contest over Israel's participation in it. More countries have said they won't be taking part.

trends.headline: There’s an Unhinged New Video Game About Trump and the Iran War
trends.summary: The game, developed by the group of anonymous artists known as Secret Handshake, is available online and in person in Washington, DC.

trends.headline: iOS, macOS, and iPadOS 26.5 updates arrive with encrypted RCS messaging and more
trends.summary: Probably the last big updates we'll see before the next versions appear at WWDC.

trends.headline: White House press dinner shooting suspect pleads not guilty
trends.summary: A California man has been charged with attempting to assassinate Trump at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner.

trends.headline: A New Hantavirus Vaccine Is in the Works
trends.summary: Since 2023, Moderna and Korea University have been developing a new mRNA vaccine for hantavirus. The work has been promising so far, but a finished product isn't likely coming any time soon.

trends.headline: 'Britain at the heart of Europe': How Starmer's plans are going down in the EU
trends.summary: Sir Keir Starmer pledged to rebuild the UK's relationship with Europe in a defiant speech on Monday.
